notes: FRESH BUILD 2026-07-20 — prior PRD/TRD/STATE deleted by user as wrong; do not reuse them. Grounded against live UAT spec (https://uat-os-ecosystem.dev.gokwik.io/api/docs-json): Core Loyalty = ONLY 4 endpoints (credit/debit with required idempotency_key, balance, history — all phone-keyed). No bulk-credit, no rules API/hook, no QR API, no loyalty customers/export API, no loyalty scopes, no loyalty webhook topics, no customer-create/search-by-phone, no OTP API. App owns: bulk ops via SQS worker (idempotency bulk:{opId}:{rowNo}), rule storage+evaluation on orders/create webhook crediting only the EXTRA coins (rule:{ruleId}:{orderId}) with active rule set cached in Redis via core RedisService (MySQL source of truth, invalidate on rule mutation, DB fallback when Redis down), QR lifecycle + printable poster; claim UI = storefront widget SDK packages/loyalty-sdk (hasStorefrontSdk TRUE; _template-sdk golden path, wizzy-sdk reference, freq-bought-style delivery): QR encodes {storefront_base_url}/?loyalty_qr={code}, loader detects param, claim widget drives KwikPass login (window.handleCustomLogin + user-loggedin event, token from KWIKUSERTOKEN keys), app's public claim API verifies gk-access-token via GoKwik customer-profile API (LOYALTY_GK_CUSTOMER_API_URL) to resolve verified phone — NO app-hosted page, NO OTP/SMS infra (11 app tables); storefront integration = FBT (SDK) widget flow from wellversed-2.0 (src/widgets/common/FBT reference): SDK exposes window.RatioLoyalty.initClaim + self-init fallback; IN-SCOPE deliverable = LoyaltyClaim Shopkit wrapper widget PR in wellversed-2.0 (registry entry + root-template placement + NEXT_PUBLIC_LOYALTY_SDK_URL/_API_BASE_URL envs), bridges KwikPass via loyalty:login:request event. Exports: worker streams CSV to S3 (new core/storage/s3.service.ts), presigned downloads, email link via new core/email/email.service.ts (SES, EMAIL_FROM) required when >10k rows. Rules engine = dynamic nested AND/OR condition trees (customer + order fields, shared Zod schema). Local customer mirror for export/search/leaderboard, daily snapshots for dashboard trends. Scope: source-PRD Phase 1+2. Storefront claim page = separate PR to wellversed-2.0 (outside this repo's CI). Open Qs in TRD §8: merchant-JWT acceptance, Core phone format, GoKwik profile API base URL, Core base-earn liveness.

history.note: Verified the ZERO-CODE storefront path (single <script> include, no wellversed-2.0 component). Traced real code + added src/script-include.integration.test.ts composing the REAL loader + REAL claim-widget against a stubbed backend: script src `{apiBase}/loyalty/sdk/loyalty-loader.js?store=m1` on a page with ?loyalty_qr=CODE → self-init overlay → widget derives api-base+merchant-id from script src → GET /loyalty/qr/CODE/status → active CTA → tap → POST /loyalty/qr/CODE/claim with ONLY {gkAccessToken} → credited render + loyalty:claim:success event; and inert (no widget/no fetch) on a normal page. SDK now 42 tests/6 files, typecheck+lint+build green. Client endpoints match backend routes exactly; claim uses plain cross-origin fetch (token in body, no cookies). DEPLOY PRECONDITIONS for it to work live (config/deploy, NOT code): (1) loyalty in the running API ENABLED_MODULES; (2) packages/loyalty-sdk/dist present at runtime (backend serves from process.cwd()/packages/loyalty-sdk/dist — ship it in the image / build before boot); (3) storefront origin (https://wellversed.in) in backend ALLOWED_ORIGINS (public /loyalty/qr/* rely on global enableCors allowlist — supports exact + https://*.gokwik.in wildcard); (4) LOYALTY_GK_CUSTOMER_API_URL set (token verification) + merchant config.storefrontBaseUrl set (QR URL minting) + valid merchant OAuth token (Core credit); (5) KwikPass present on the storefront (window.handleCustomLogin + KWIKUSERTOKEN) — true on wellversed-2.0. All are the same env/secrets/IAM items already listed in TRD §7.

QR-claim identity rearchitected (plan: docs/agent/changes/loyalty-qr-claim-v2/PLAN.md; SDD ledger: .superpowers/sdd/progress.md, base b16de3d). The backend NO LONGER resolves identity — KwikPass/GoKwik removed entirely from apps/backend (GokwikIdentityClient + token + LOYALTY_GK_CUSTOMER_API_URL deleted in Task 4; grep 'GokwikIdentity|GK_CUSTOMER_API_URL|gkAccessToken' in apps/backend/src is empty). NEW FLOW: the browser talks only to its own storefront origin; the wellversed-2.0 BFF (src/app/api/loyalty/{status,claim}/route.ts, runtime nodejs) resolves the verified phone from the KwikPass token via the GoKwik customer-profile API, then HMAC-signs sig=HMAC_SHA256(`${merchantId}.${qr}.${phone}.${ts}`, per-merchant secret) hex and POSTs {merchantId, phone, ts, sig} to /loyalty/qr/{code}/claim. Backend verifies via ClaimSignatureService (constant-time timingSafeEqual, ±5-min ts window, body.merchantId==qr.merchantId), reads loyalty_configs.claimSigningSecret. Task 1: shared loyaltyClaimRequestSchema {merchantId,phone,ts,sig}. Task 2: claim-signature.service.ts (sign/verify). Task 3: migration 0002_claim_signing_secret + bootstrap generateClaimSecret (randomBytes(32) base64). Task 4: qr-claim.controller rewrite; response invalid_session→invalid_signature; downstream (mirror/scan INSERT IGNORE (qr_code_id,phone), Core key qr:{qrId}:{phone}) unchanged; uniqueness still per-QR (same phone MAY claim different QRs). Task 5: admin ClaimSecretCard + GET loyalty-config/claim-secret {claimSecretSet:boolean} + POST rotate (raw secret never returned). Task 6: loyalty-sdk same-origin — LoyaltyClient baseUrl=window.location.origin, GET /api/loyalty/status?qr=, POST /api/loyalty/claim {qr,gkAccessToken}, no envelope-unwrap, no ngrok header, claim.js now IIFE; loader base-url attr = page origin. Task 7: wellversed-2.0 wrapper widget + BFF routes CODE-COMPLETE + verified (typecheck+build; BFF HMAC recipe byte-identical to backend) — commit PENDING, blocked by that repo's corrupted src/app/editor submodule + heavy pre-commit hook (environmental; USER to land + set envs NEXT_PUBLIC_LOYALTY_SDK_URL, LOYALTY_API_BASE_URL, LOYALTY_CLAIM_SECRET, LOYALTY_MERCHANT_ID, GK_MERCHANT_ID). Task 8: Dockerfile ships loyalty-sdk dist; loader no-cache + versioned claim immutable (+test); package.json loyalty scripts; loyalty-sdk README + TRD §2b/§4 + this STATE + storefront-widget skill updated to v2. FULL WORKSPACE VERIFY GREEN: pnpm -r typecheck 0, build 0, lint 0; test — only pre-existing admin-rp empty-suite exit-1 (no individual test failed; known meta/google flakies did not recur).
